title: Glyphs
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Glyphs             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat Apr 27, 2013 1:11 pm The new NERV logo has those glyphs in the lower left corner... and in the scene with the choker, we get an alphabet with those glyphs (not compiled by me) SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Glyphs             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 27, 2013 1:25 pm qu4d wrote: And have you spotted those glyphs anywhere else?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Apr 27, 2013 1:34 pm They're in the 2.0 CRC book, page 87, credited to Anno himself. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by andreh » Sat Apr 27, 2013 3:17 pm Seem to be alien writings Maybe they are copies of the language present in the Dead Sea Scrolls?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 27, 2013 4:17 pm With 88 characters, there's no obvious match to a character set (unlike the Madoka witch-runes).

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Apr 27, 2013 4:30 pm Google gives 使徒封印用呪詛文様 as "Apostle Sealing curse pattern" so it seems to be the typical Gainax/khara Kanjiflood way of saying some straightforward as Anti-Angel Runes. Was there threads about this before? I can't imagine there weren't some back in 2.0 days but too lazy to look.

[]:             Quote Post by Koishiro » Sat Apr 27, 2013 5:19 pm Apparently, none of the glyphs listed match with the ones on the tangram logo. Sigh... well, it's Eva after all. But what bugs me on that new logo is: why the two glyphs of the right are exactly the same as those on the left, just flipped 90º? Flipped glyphs means different things or just stylish placement?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Apr 27, 2013 7:50 pm Either way, it's most likely the FAR language.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Apr 28, 2013 12:00 am Originally I was planning to play this game myself, but then I realized I like sleep. But in case anyone is incredibly bored.... Here's a nice clean version of the CRC glyphs, with rows and columns numbered for easy reference SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sun Apr 28, 2013 6:59 am It may have to do that the glyphs in the NERV logo are stylized but i cant identifiy any of those with the glyphs on the sheet for which we have letters/numbers. Is that only me or was it allready deciphired?

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sun Apr 28, 2013 8:37 am From the things you noticed thread - Glyphs also in the Eva 13 cockpit SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Apr 28, 2013 8:54 am These symbols have appeared many times throughout the rebuilt films. This could be something groundbreaking and important! Or not...........Considering that this is Anno we are talking about. He most likely won't touch these things in 4.0 anymore.....

[]:             Quote Post by lastcody » Sun Apr 28, 2013 9:27 am These symbols have appeared many times throughout the rebuilt films. This could be something groundbreaking and important! Or not...........Considering that this is Anno we are talking about. He most likely won't touch these things in 4.0 anymore.....

[]:             Quote Post by Koishiro » Sun Apr 28, 2013 3:04 pm Free time, so just made this (thanks TMBounty!): SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sun Apr 28, 2013 3:07 pm Koishiro wrote: Free time, so just made this (thanks TMBounty!): SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 28, 2013 3:17 pm Nice work. I'd put my bets on "B" (you can see a line to the left) and "K" (since there is a clearly recognizable "R" already).

[]:             Quote Post by Koishiro » Sun Apr 28, 2013 7:07 pm Ow, thanks Ramiel & Reichu. These things really intrigue me; I was trying to find some hidden message on the DSS Choker, and I discovered two facts: - The glyphs spin in a "8" shape, or "infinite" symbol if you prefer; - There's no way to find a message there because the glyphs change every freakin' time! On normal speed you don't notice this, but only when you stop frame by frame you see that they change in a blink. ANNOOOO I'm starting to think that these symbols actually lead to nowhere, just a incomplete puzzle tossed to the fans spend their neurons trying to solve it.

[]:             Quote Post by toji_ » Mon Apr 29, 2013 4:11 am qu4d wrote: From the things you noticed thread - Glyphs also in the Eva 13 cockpit SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by mireyu » Mon Apr 29, 2013 4:27 am Sigh. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Yokai » Mon Apr 29, 2013 5:53 am mireyu wrote: Sigh. SPOILER: Show
